steps.text: For eight years, small things get quietly fixed overnight - always the same distinctive brass screws.
It's Warren. Anonymously maintaining the district he wasn't sure he had the right to lead.

The choice was Gary's: publish the heartwarming scoop, or keep his secret. Both endings are written. Keeping it earns nothing except Warren, at the dock, and a single brass screw - a rehearsal, it turns out, for the week's hardest choice.
